decision_text: Your stomach drops as you open Croneslist to sell...
This broom is your freedom. But rent is due.
Every flight could be your last before you list it.
You trace the duct tape with your finger. It's ugly, but it's yours.
post_sale: The money hits your account. Rent is covered. Your feet already hurt.
You watch another witch fly past your window. That was you yesterday.
At least you're not homeless. Just... grounded.
You stare at the empty broom hook by your door.

decision_text: Time to say goodbye to old faithful.
Someone else will love this broom like you did.
It served you well, but you've outgrown the duct tape aesthetic.
One witch's trash is another's treasure, right?
post_sale: Sold! Time to hunt for something better.
Your old broom has a new owner. Circle of life.
The money will help with the new one. No regrets.
Goodbye, smelly dog broom. Hello, possibilities!

decision_text: Are you REALLY selling your Moonweave?
You'll never find another premium this cheap...
post_sale: What have you done? WHAT HAVE YOU DONE?
Someone just got the deal of a lifetime. Your lifetime.
The money doesn't make walking hurt less.
You sold a Moonweave. For RENT. This will haunt you forever.

grateful: OMG THANK YOU! I've been walking for a month!
You just saved my life! My feet are killing me!
FINALLY! I can fly to work again!
premium_excited: A MOONWEAVE FOR THIS PRICE?! Christmas came early!
I can't believe someone would sell this! Their loss!
Just snagged a premium broom! Best day ever!

regret_levels.see_other_flying: That should be me up there.
